title: Better Wandering Trader Trades (BWTT)
description: A simple mod that gives the wandering trader the chance to have better trading options.
body:
This mod gives the wandering trader the chance to offer several better trades. 

**This does not override vanilla trades completely, it just adds to the vanilla trade pool.**

**Made with MCreator**

## New Trades
- 35 Arrows
- Disc 5
- Disc 11
- Disc 13
- Pigstep
- Enchanting Table
- Iron Golem Spawn Eggs
- TNT
- Trident
- Jukebox
- Nether Scrap
- Compass
- Totem of Undying 
- Wolf Armor
- Ender Pearls
- Shield
- Diamond Sword
- Diamond Pickaxe
- Enchanted Golden Apple
- Milk Bucket
- Bonemeal
- Snow Golem Spawn Eggs
- Diamond Axe
- Diamond Horse Armor
- Diamond Chestplate
